title: Airer Clothes Drying Rack,4-Tier Grey Foldable Clothes Hanger Adjustable Large Stainless Steel Garment Laundry Racks for Indoor Outdoor with Foldable Wings
features: [LARGE DRYING SPACE]: With 4 layers, consisting of 6 retractable layers and 2 side wings, 3 layers can be folded down for reasons of space. This drying rack offers more space for storage or drying, but also help save space

[4-TIER OVERSIZED AIRER] Oversized 4-tier design and 2 wing hooks for drying towels, socks, clothes, shoes, quilts, etc. Each level has 8 posts, 7 hooks on 2 side wings, you can hang longer suits or dresses. There is enough space to dry whole family's clothes.

[ADJUSTABLE & MOVABLE]: This garment rack can be adjusted and reassembled to suit different needs or drying environments. There are four wheels at the bottom which is easy to be moved when the clothes are hanging on the rack
[DURABLE]: The drying rack is made of a combination of painted galvanized steel pipe and plastic. Not easy to rust and break. Each layer can bear up to 5kg and each side wing can bear up to 3kg
[EASY TO ASSEMBLE]: Size 170cm Height x 76cm Width. The drying rack is very easy to install, with detailed instructions, one person can complete the assembly.
[STABLE DESIGN]: Made of high-hardness stainless steel and thick plastic, this drying rack has bold double columns on both sides, providing more stability than ordinary drying racks.
